---
title: "Elizabeth Parkinson"
---

## Elizabeth Parkinson

**Dates:** (b. 1818)

### Description

schoolmistress

### Biography

She was owner of a girls\' school in Brighton recommended by CMY in 1866.  It was at 6 Peel Terrace, Dyke Road, Brighton, and appears in the censuses for 1871, 1881 and 1891.

### Letters

- Letter from Dec 30th [1866?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
